reviews.title: Good location, but old hotel
reviews.positives: The location is near to the night market, only 19 minutes away from the airport, there are many restaurants and store around
reviews.negatives:
AC was not cooling at all, it was uncomfortable more in hot season, in addition, there was a remodeling going on, so they started to work around 8 am, we could rest properly for the noise (there was not a aware about this situation)
old equipment and furnitures, the floor was deteriorated, no in good condition.

reviews.response: You booked incorrectly, so why did you give our hotel a low rating? The fault lies with you for not carefully reviewing the room photos. Our hotel was established first; the other hotel opened later and used the same name.

reviews.title: convenient hotel on the main road
reviews.positives: very good location. its walking distance to Dinh cau temple and night market the most popular places in Duong Dong. Also its easy to go to Vinbus stop to airport. The room is old style but clean.
reviews.negatives: a bit noisy because the hotel is on the main road. you can hear the traffic though after 11 its ok, Overall not too bad.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Stay if you are deep sleeper and don't  mind noises from the visiting massage customers and staffs talking loud at night. Cause they put you in the room nearest to to the lobby. Not forgetting the fun loving neighbours sharing their karaoke session and conversation on Friday and weekend  till midnight. Regrad booking with agoda with no cancellation policy waiver after checking in for the subsequent night stay when all hell was  discovered.

reviews.title: Venus hotel Phu Quoc review
reviews.text: I would not recommend anyone to stay at this hotel. We booked a high-floor room with an unobstructed sea view for three days through Agoda. However, upon check-in, we were given a ground-floor room with a blocked view. When we politely asked for an explanation, we were told that they had decided to give our reserved room to another guest with a longer stay. We were even told that if we were unhappy, we could leave the hotel. After a round of arguments, they finally moved us to the room we originally booked—but only after one day. This experience was extremely frustrating for a traveler seeking a smooth, hassle-free trip. For this reason, I cannot recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.negatives: Curtain

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.text: Bad

reviews.title: Poor location
reviews.text: We booked this hotel on the strength of the website information and dome reviews in the belief it was on the beach. This proved not to be true. We arrived, had to carry our own bags to the 5th floor to find the hotel overlooked some rocks covered with garbage and the nearest swimming beach was 300 metres away up the main road. There was no restaurant and no where nearby to even get some food. The staff was quite rude we when told her we were checking out immediately and that her website was false advertising. There was the expected refusal of any payment we had made as we expected from her attitude.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: No había agua caliente, tampoco papel higiénico, en una de las habitaciones había mucho viento y no se podía dormir,  en otra se escuchaba mucho el tráfico, en otra no había cartel para limpiar la habitación y no la limpiaron,  las fotos no se parecen a lo que es, la nevera no enfría y el skybar está cerrado

reviews.title: My experience
reviews.text: the location is not good nor is the room. we booked using agoda looking it pictures we thaught it would be good. but not according to the money.  If possible and you want to book go above 2nd floor.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Np tuve el placer de visitarlo porque perdimos un vuelo, pero seguro hubiera superado las expectativas.

reviews.title: Not suitable for family. Terrible Hotel
reviews.text: Don't book this Hotel. There are cracks on the ceiling and water was dripping from the roof. When we asked for room change, they gave us a shady room with bathtub next to the bed. We got cockroaches in the room, their answer is "Friendly Animal they don't harm you".  The mattress is bad and dirty. The photos are deceiving. They are also running a massage parlour in the basement which is uncomfortable for families.

reviews.title: Vistas espectaculares!!!
reviews.positives: Las vistas desde la terraza, el tamaño de la habitación, la cama muy cómoda, el baño bien y todos los días hacían  la habitación.
reviews.negatives: El cheking, muchas pegas para aceptar dólares ante la mínima marca, realmente creo que lo hacían para dar peor cambio.

reviews.title: definitely no
reviews.text: The room look so old. I dont think the change a new bedsheet because the bedsheet got lizard’s poop. it also smells like very old dusty place. yes it is cheap but would not recommend it

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Vue magnifique sur la mer, possibilité de louer un scooter à la semaine sans loger à l'hôtel, jeune fille à l'accueil super qui parle anglais
reviews.negatives: Chambre qui a subit un dégâts des eaux, papiers peint en mauvais état, parquet qui se détache, casque scooter de mauvaise qualité

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: It's ok

reviews.title: Vue sur la mer appréciable
reviews.positives:
A dix minutes à pied du marché de nuit et 5 minutes de la plage, on trouve toutes les commodités à proximité.
La vue sur la mer de la chambre et terrasse aurait été encore mieux aux étages supérieurs. 
La chambre était spacieuse et bien équipée.
Le personnel était serviable et parlait anglais.
reviews.negatives: La chambre 103 qui est au niveau de la réception est très bruyante mais heureusement plus calme après 23h.

reviews.title: I won't recommend this place
reviews.text:
Was disappointed by the room changing. I book 2 nights and sea view with double bed. The hotel provides me only for the first night and forced us to move to another floor due to renovating and give us a single bed room instead. They give me a refund but only for half of it.
Staff can't speak English, 
Room was too old and impractical for charging.
reviews.response: Chào bạn chúng tôi rất thất vọng về đánh giá này. Như bạn được biết thì thời gian bạn ở trên đảo có mưa to gió lớn và cây cối đổ điện cũng mất trên toàn bộ khu vực. Nên 2 phòng bạn ở bị ảnh hưởng và có hư hỏng đôi chút về phần cửa và máy lạnh , chúng tôi hiểu được sẽ ảnh hướng đến thời gian lưu trú của bạn nên chúng tôi đã rất lịch sự chuyển bạn lên tầng cao hạng phòng cùng phân khúc và giảm 50% tiền phòng cho bạn với hạng phòng tầm nhìn ra biển này bạn chỉ cần trả 210k vnd là rất rẻ, bạn cũng đã vui vẻ đồng ý nhưng lại gửi 1 khiếu nại . Nếu bạn không hài lòng hãy nói với chúng tôi ngay lúc đó .

reviews.title: Excellent pour petits budgets
reviews.positives: Tout près du centre, du night market
reviews.negatives:
Sur le bord de la mer mais sans accès à la plage. 
Le personnel ne parlait pas vraiment anglais

reviews.title: Old and dirty
reviews.text:
The walls of the room were dirty. There was a colony of ants in the room. The towels were child size and with holes in them. 
However, it is well located and sea view is nice especially for sunset.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Chambre donnée côté route principale, porte-fenêtre ne ferme pas,  bruit de la route

reviews.title: Girl staff with bad attitude
reviews.text: One girl staff is friendly and very good but another girl staff cannot speak good english and dont know how to handle customer, and even talk bad about customer with his guy friends, bad attitude girl.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower

reviews.title: Nicht gut aber günstig
reviews.negatives:
Eins vorweg: Wir sind nicht das erste Mal in Asien unterwegs und was Zimmer angehen haben wir nicht besonders hohe Ansprüche - aber das Hotel ist wirklich nicht zu empfehlen!
Es ist super hellhörig im 1. Stock (bestimmt aber nicht nur da)- daher auch sehr laut. Man hört alles was an der Rezeption und in bzw. vor den anderen Zimmern passiert wie z.B. die Klingeln der Zimmer, die ständig zu hören waren.
Der Kühlschrank funktionierte nicht, war schimmlig und Mini Tiere saßen drin.
Die Klimaanlage war super laut und hat oft ganz komische Geräusche gemacht..
Von 5 Steckdosen funktionierte nur eine  gut, eine sehr wackelig. Nur eine ist in Bettnähe - die natürlich auch nicht funktionierte (bei einem 3er Zimmer trotzdem von Grund auf zu wenig) 
Wände schmutzig, stellenweise löste sich die Tapete ab. Eine Ecke war total schimmlig.
Die Bettwäsche und Handtücher sind genauso dreckig wie die Vorhänge. Die Federmatratzen waren durchgelegen und man hat jede Feder gespürt.
Das Laminat vom Fußboden ist total verschoben und hat teilweise bis zu 3cm Größe Fugen drin.
Die einzige Lampe im Zimmer ist eine Neonröhre
Das Badezimmer hat seine besten Zeiten schon länger hinter sich. Der Waschtisch ist so wackelig, dass man Angst hat dass er gleich runter fällt und die Klobrille ist gebrochen.
Den Griff der Balkontüre hatten wir mehrmals in der Hand und die Türe ging auch nur auf, wenn sie Lust hatte (sehr alte Holztüre mit einem Verschluss aus den 80ern)

Fazit: abgenutzt und dreckig hier, aber der Blick aufs Meer ist ganz nett - zumindest von unserem Zimmer aus.

reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.text: The hotel is very old and no hot water. It’s dirty and they do another business in the hotel which is not good for ladies to stay

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The sky bar is permanently closed. I paid extra for room with view. I was put on first floor looking directly at building and old garbage scattered tires. They moved me the next day up to level 4 there was the view. But there were no table or chair to sit out on balcony. A very dated room… it just looks fresher in pictures. My mistake in thinking it had a beach…..I ended up leaving early that morning my room was paid for another night. I managed to get a beautiful resort a private chalet on an amazing pool for the same price. I’m really glad I made the move!

reviews.title: Deze hotel keuze was een vergissing onzer zijds.
reviews.negatives: Het balkon en de kamer was redelijk, echter zonder zitmeubilair wij hadden om minstens één stoel gevraagd voor het balkon. Deze vraag werd resoluut afgewezen. De elektriciteit in het algemeen en de fön in het bijzonder zag er gevaarlijk bedraad uit. Verder was e.e.a. vergane glorie.

reviews.title: Instant noodles scammer
reviews.text:
47k wasn't expensive for 3 instant noodles. But they put them in the complimentary box along side the tea bags without putting a price list. It's a trap.
Ants come once there's a dead bug.
Sockets are broken. I have to survive on my power bank.
Only thing good is it's just right across the street of vinbus stop.
reviews.response: We will fix your problem as quickly as possible. Thank you very much for choosing our service

reviews.title: ゆったり、のんびり、快適な部屋

reviews.title: TV didn't work for entire week
reviews.text: The TV didn't work when we moved in. We asked them to fix it, they said they can't fix it. So, no TV in the room for the entire stay.
reviews.response: We are sorry for the inconvenience. We will try to fix it and serve you better on your next vacation. Welcome

reviews.title: No blackout curtains, traffic noise from the main street
reviews.text:
If you book the seaview room it is ok. The room is overlooking the see, very nice view and nice sunset. Nice balcony. However as there are no blackout curtains you will hard time sleeping after 6 AM.
However street view rooms are facing east so you will get full sunshine after 6 AM. Also balcony door does not close completely so you will hear all the traffic noise (drivers love to honk here a lot).
Common problems:
- The receptionist tried to extort some money from us on the pretext that bed sheets are dirty from soda and that cannot use snd that we have pay for them. When I told her to bring them to me and that I will clean it I never heard from her again.
2. There is no sky bar as the name suggest
3. They do not you go to the massage downstairs unless you are a single male. I heard that the rate is 2 milion dong
4. The elevator is the slowest I have seen
5. The beach is 400 m far
6. The hotel is in between 2 bus stops
7. There is a nice supermarket just next door
8. There are a few restaurants by the seaside at walking distance
9. There few seafood restaurants nearby with a lot of live seafood

reviews.title: Kỳ nghỉ thú vị, phòng nghỉ phù hợp với nhu cầu của tôi, lễ tân nhiệt tình chu đáo

reviews.negatives: Phòng ở cần cải thiện tốt hơn,ví dụ đường nước nóng để tắm chưa tốt

reviews.text: 地点不错就是比较老旧的酒店。

reviews.title: great location, and cheap but the hotel is not really well maintained.
reviews.text: The hotel is indeed in a good location - close to dining options, near the night market, and there is a bus stop right outside the hotel entrance. However, the hotel itself feels quite old and hasn't been maintained well for a long time. The hotel staff took us to see a sea-view room on the 3rd floor, but we decided not to take it because the room looked really dated. The family room we stayed in was acceptable, but after staying for four days, it seemed like the floors, especially in the bathroom, hadn't been properly cleaned. The receptionist, even though she didn't speak English, was very friendly.

reviews.positives: Locate, view and the room is big

reviews.title: Very noisy due to construction next door
reviews.text: all up the room is large and clean and everything in it reasonable quality however there is no television and hot water. what made my stay intolerable was the construction work next door which continued between 7:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. everyday and I had to leave because I could not hold video calls without excessive background noise making it difficult to communicate.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Ok hôtel
reviews.text: Well located.  Sea view thru a  small window.  Staff more interested in their cell phone then the clients.  About zero info given.   Room 502 double bed need a mattress change, you feel the springs, too old.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower

reviews.title: Not a good place if you aren't from selected few countries
reviews.text:
Pros:
1. Good location, view of the sea was fantastic 
2. Walking distance to night market.
3. Great place to stay if you are Korean or a caucasian from any country.

Cons:
1. Not a good place if you are from India/Indian subcontinent.
2. They prioritize Koreans and White people first, then whatever hospitality/facility is left it's yours.
3. If you are a fan of hot showers afters a long and tiring day of touring around, don't book this place as they have NO HOT WATER.
4. There are many other hotels with same distance to night market, so don't make that your criteria for booking this place.
5. Their charging sockets are just put randomly anywhere, no thoughts given to comfort, usability or reachability.

Conclusion: All they have is a good view in affordable price. Rest is all cr@p.

Again, don't book this if you are anything other than Korean/White skinned person. You will not be given any kind of priority despite paying the same money.
reviews.response: Hello. We don't discriminate at all. The reason is that the Korean group is very large and has a lot of luggage. To avoid mixing up your luggage with theirs, we've kept your luggage separate for easy identification and control to prevent loss. We've explained this thoroughly to your husband; there's no reason for us to discriminate against our Indian friends. You are a very important customer group to us. Since we're all in Asia, the room rates are the same, and we guarantee there will be no discrimination whatsoever. - Regarding hot water: Because we use a solar energy system, it will heat up a little slowly, so please be patient.

reviews.title: Manipulative staff
reviews.text: Trying to extort additional money

reviews.title: Rất tuyệt
reviews.positives: Rất gần trung tâm, gần biển lên rất tiện đi lại 2 nơi.

reviews.title: Old classic hotel in a convenient location
reviews.text:
Hotel is old and room design is way outdated. Does not even have a TV in my room. Limited facilities and amenities. 

Staff can be more helpful. 

Nonetheless, it has provided us with a safe, convenient and comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nhân viên lễ tân chu đáo, mến khách. Nhân viên khách sạn nhiệt tình hỗ trợ thiết bị điện trong phòng ở.

reviews.title: Value for Money
reviews.text:
Pros:
Location is good
Sea View is amazing 
Customer service is okay

Cons:
Old building, needs some renovation 
No Universal plugs. Sometimes Adapters are not working effectively. 
Normally hotel provides such universal adapters but here they dont have. 
Bath room dont have hot water. 
No power back up initially due to generator repair. Eventually they solved after 8 hours.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: У нас был номер с видом на море 4 этаж, просторно, чисто. Все необходимое было.
reviews.negatives:
Персонал на ресепшн слабо говорит по английскому, и вообще не оч дружелюбен, элементарную просьбу найти штопор для вина, даже на вьетнамском озвученную, не расшиблись выполнить. 
В Таиланде бы и штопор нашли и бокалы предложили.... 
А парни из ночной смены вообще сутенëрят)))

reviews.title: Value for Money with Great Sea View
reviews.text:
Pros:
Location 
Nice sea view from the balcony

Cons:
There was a power outage in the city. But it not properly mitigated with Generator. Sleep got affected due to the lack of back up plan. 
No hot water in the Rooms
There is a Universal Pin adapters and no 3 PIN power point. 
Old building. Needs some renovation.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Красивый вид из окна,есть балкон. Рядом ночной рынок, кафе, до пляжа минут 5-7. В номере есть холодильник, дают средства гигиены.
reviews.negatives: Не берите номер возле ресепшена, шум 24/7 гарантирован. За три ночи нормально не поспали ни одной. Ночью гости отеля шумно возвращаются в свои номера, с утра уже персонал шуршит по работе.

reviews.title: Pic misleading
reviews.text:
The hotel is a budget hotel in a good location
I booked a room based on the pic attached to the room description but this was not the room I was given. I was advised the pics are for "reference only"

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Чисто, уютно, есть все необходимое для проживания. До ночного рынка 1-2 минуты пешком, рядом басстапы, обменный пункт. Для маломобильных есть лифт, один минус, нет своего выхода к морю, нужно немного пройтись вдоль дороги до спуска к нему.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Basic but with a view! The hotel itself is a bit old and could use some updating, but the sea view from the balcony totally made up for it. It was the perfect spot to relax and enjoy the scenery.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Большой просторный номер с балкончиком.
В номере всё необходимое - ванная комната, телевизор, холодильник, чайник, кондиционер.
Чисто. Уборка в номере производилась каждый день.
Хорошее расположение - недалеко от ночного рынка и до пляжа 5 минут пешком.
reviews.negatives:
Окна выходили на оживлённую улицу, вечером трудно было уснуть из-за шума.
Мебель старая.
Балкон очень маленький.
Можно только стоять.

reviews.title: The rooftop bar had fallen into ruin.
reviews.text: I stayed there because it had a rooftop bar, but it was in ruins. The hotel itself was old, with the elevator call button missing, the window locks not working, and the windows requiring a lot of force to open and close. However, the accommodation price was cheap, there were many restaurants and massage shops nearby, and it was within walking distance to the night market, making it a suitable hotel for backpacker-style travelers.

reviews.title: В целом не плохо
reviews.positives: Отзывчивый персонал, расположение в близи с рынком и хорошими кафешками
reviews.negatives: Под окнами отеля есть жилой дом где бесконечно орёт петух, он как будто 24/7 кудахчет, одним словом, петух!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Nice View

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Хороший отель! Уборка каждый день, но постельное за 9 дней не поменяли! В номере живет маленькая ящерица ( Валера). На ресепшен можно взять байк на прокат. Берите номер, с видом на море! С видом на город, шумно! А в целом все супер!

reviews.title: 위치는 좋지만...
reviews.text: 해변뷰라 파도 소리 들리고 석양도 방에서 볼수 있어서 좋습니다. 주위에 로컬식당과 마사지샾 야시장도 가깝습니다.  하지만 지하에 불건전 마사지.....가구는 20년 이상되고....비행기 시간 기다리는 용도로 가족 여행객에게는 적합하지 않습니다

Персонал приятный и вежливый
Каждый день уборка, смена полотенец, каждый день приносят две бутылки воды

Но он не очень новый, имейте это в виду. 
Там нет телевизора, но мне телевизор не был нужен.
Есть платная прачечная, 50донгов 1 кг одежды.
reviews.negatives: Уборка и дополнение чая/кофе/воды только по просьбе. По своей инициативе сотрудники уборку не производят.

reviews.negatives:

- balcony needs two chairs and a table…
- the lobby could be decorated so much more cosy pretty and inviting
- the front yard’s pavement needs renewing. Its a mess.
The hotel could be so much more beautiful! It needs so much renovating and LOVE❣️ 
- at reception one girl’s English was very poor. She didnt understand simple questions even with a google translator.. the other young lady was ok

reviews.title: Exceptional but have drinking water problem
reviews.text: In the voucher it is mentioned that they will give free water during our stay but they provide only one water bottle for one person it was really disappointing otherwise hotel is nice with good view of sea from window.
reviews.response: Hello, we have kept our commitment. 1 customer 1 bottle of water a day. You have 2 people, every day we clean the room and provide you with 2 free bottles of water for 2 people. If you need more, please buy.

reviews.title: Couple travel
reviews.text: The hotel has a convenient location and easy access. The staff is also friendly and enthusiastic. The room is quite clean but needs to improve some amenities, such as not having a hairdryer which can be inconvenient when wanting to wash hair, and a few power outlets are not working. The parking lot in front is convenient. Additionally, the VinBus stop is right in front of the hotel, making it easy to get around.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Beautiful sea view and good location to explore the beautiful island of Phu Quoc .

reviews.title: Good place
reviews.text: Tempat yang bagus

reviews.title: It was ok
reviews.text:
My wife and I enjoyed our stay at this hotel overall. The staff were very friendly and easy to communicate with, which made our visit pleasant.

We spent three nights in one room with no issues, so we decided to add an extra night. However, after changing rooms, we were given a very oddly designed room where the bathtub was placed in the bedroom along the wall. It was quite difficult to shower because there were no glass panels or enclosure, so water splashed onto the floor near the bed, giving the impression that the room was not fully finished but was being rented out anyway.

I also want to note that the hotel is on a fairly noisy street that stays lively well past midnight. If you are a light sleeper, you may want to bring earplugs.

Aside from these points, our experience was generally acceptable

reviews.title: Beautiful sea view
reviews.text: Great view of the sea but noisy due to construction nearby

reviews.title: Great As Long As You’re a Smoker
reviews.text: The huge issue for me is the cigarette smoke! The guys all sit around and constantly smoke, in the front of the hotel entrance, as well as in the big sitting area just inside the lobby. The glass sliding doors to my small standing room balcony wouldn’t close….one didn’t budge, and the other left a 1/2” gap and wouldn’t completely close. The smoke was coming in from there, as well as from the hallway, because my door also had gaps all around it.  I’m positive people were smoking in their rooms anyway, despite the hotel claiming non smoking in rooms. It was horrible! The location isn’t bad, as restaurants, shopping, and massages are everywhere. It’s a bit of a walk to get to the beach, but well worth it, as the beach is very long and the swimming is good. I would NOT go back to this hotel to stay.

reviews.title: A place with good cost performance!
reviews.text:
Accommodation for independent travelers.

A perfect place to stay at a budget price! 
They clean every day and change towels as well.

The counter staff are extremely friendly and 
they communicate using a translation app when there's a language barrier.

It's a place where you can stay for 10,000 to 20,000 won per night.

If you request a motorcycle rental at the counter, 
they will bring it to you. It’s affordable at 150,000 dong per day.

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.text: They promptly and politely responded to my questions even before my stay.

reviews.title: It's a bit ambiguous, please check the details.
reviews.text:
1. Staff friendliness
2. Cleanliness of the accommodation
3. I used the 5th floor, but the elevator button for going down on the 5th floor didn't work, so I had to press the button for going up to ride it
4. The location is ambiguously good, and the night market is a 10-minute walk away
5. However, the door was a sliding door that wouldn't open, so I had to use a lot of force to get it open like a training exercise
6. The price is incredibly cheap, so if you're looking for value for money, I highly recommend it
7. The toilet's water doesn't fill up, so I have to keep pouring water in every day to make it work

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: For the price of ~USD 14 for a room with balcony,  sea view, 1 double bed & 1 single bed, it is value for money.  Location wise -quite convenient as public beach & night market are just within 500m radius. Hotel is quite old & facilities are of very basic (no more sky bar ). Staffs are helpful.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great sea view, convenient location. The room was spacious with lots of natural light, but a bit old/run down.

reviews.title: In walking distance to the night market
reviews.text: Pros: You can see the sunset from the sea view room. The night market is a 10-minute walk away. There is a nearby bus stop for Vin Bus line 17 or 19 to Grand World (Vin Wonders) (transfer required to Vin). There are many restaurants and massage places nearby, which is convenient. Cons: The lock on the balcony is broken and cannot be secured. No security box. There was a power outage. Only bath towels provided. WiFi is slow. For your reference.

If you don't mind it, this is a good stay. We didn't face any trouble by their night activities, but just want to share it so people are aware.

reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower

reviews.title: Sea view
reviews.text:
Hi, I stayed here for 1 night. The hotel staff, especially the receptionist, were very helpful and friendly. The hotel is also near a seafood restaurant that is delicious and cheap, and there is a free shuttle bus to Grandworld and the airport. I went to the airport at 5 am, and the free shuttle bus was already in operation. So great!

No worries about getting anywhere you want. The room is clean with a sea view and has a sofa. Overall, it's been good. I love staying here and recommend it to you!

reviews.title: A little sharing about Venus
reviews.text:
- The receptionists are cheerful and friendly.
- The room is clean, the wooden floor has some slight damage, and there are many gaps. The sea view from the balcony is beautiful. Our family stayed on the 2nd floor, so the view is not the best. Everyone should request a higher floor room.
- The amenities are relatively complete, including a smart TV, a hairdryer, and an electric kettle.
- The toilet has hot and cold water powered by solar energy but is quite limited because if it rains, there will be no hot water.
- The hotel has an elevator and a parking lot for cars.

reviews.title: Good Location with Nice View From Balcony
reviews.text: Walking distance to phu quoc night market. Nice seaview from my room's balcony. However, balcony sliding door and toilet door are broken. Stayed for 4 nights and yesterday someone at another building singing loudly til 12am. We can't rest well due to their terrible singing. Overall, worth the money.

reviews.title: Great facilities, warm staff
reviews.text:

Provide complimentary water, kettle, tea and coffee. 
Some noise in the morning due to building work on going which was a bit disturbing at 0630 in the morning

reviews.text: Affordable price, next to the restaurant Xin Chao. This Dương Đông area has the best prices. The room is very clean and spacious. Soundproofing is slightly poor. The staff is kind and friendly; however, they do not escort guests to the room or help carry luggage like some other places.

reviews.title: I want to come here again!
reviews.text: Overall it is old, but it is well maintained. I stayed in a sea view room on the 4th floor. The view of the sea from the balcony is wonderful. The room and bathroom are clean. There are two bottles of water and coffee and tea available. Also, you can walk to the supermarket and night market. I think it's a wonderful hotel because of its location and sea view. The only drawback is that the shower has cold water at night. Warm showers are available from daytime to evening because the hot water is generated by solar power.

The location isn't bad for going out to explore. I booked it cheaply since I arrived at night and had a trip to the north the next day, and I'm taking a good rest here.

reviews.title: The cost performance is excellent!
reviews.text: I stayed for 4 nights. The room was reasonably spacious, located on the 4th floor, and the Wi-Fi was working fine. The facilities are old but still functional, so no issues there. It takes about a 3-minute walk to the VinBus bus stop. The night market is also about a 10-minute walk away. The only downside was that the shower water was lukewarm even on the hottest setting, but for this price, I can't complain. There was daily bed-making, and amenities like water and toothbrushes were provided. They also stored my luggage. I saved quite a bit on accommodation costs while still having a comfortable stay, so I was very satisfied. ☆

reviews.title: Amazing stay wonderful staff perfect location
reviews.text:
We have booked this stay for our trip in Phu Quoc. Airport bus halts at walking distance of this hotel. Also sunset town bus stop is at walking distance which is big plus of this hotel.

When we stayed there was a renovation going on thus we were unable to explore the property. Night market is at walking distance.

Rooms are clean, facilities are awesome they followed out special request as well.

If you book it offline you'll get their most luxury room at the price of basic room through online booking. Staff is kind and attentive they'll fulfill all your requests instantly. They helped me to rent a vehicle in nominal standard price.

I will recommend this hotel to everyone even though there are several simial options available.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The stay was very comfortable. The room was very clean and sea view room was worth the price and stay. Highly recommend this hotel as this is the centre place to visit both north and south.

reviews.title: Ideal hotel for budget travellers.

reviews.title: Best View, Great Staff
reviews.text: 5 ⭐ because their staff is amazing, the girl at the reception helped me to recover an old phone that i lost ( valuable because of the pictures traveling). Certainly the hotel needs some retouch in walls etc. Still 5 ⭐ because the privilege of the view, the location with minimart beside ( selling Vietnamese yummy dark chocolate and everything) coffee shop in front and yummy and affordable vegetarian restaurant. Also need to change the lamps/lights position because it's killing the eyes 👀 of the guess who enjoy watching YouTube etc... The lamp location isn't the best. The toilet and cleanliness are great. Blessed by the creator is sleep with the sea sound  😊. For swimming etc in a clean, good and for free go to GrandWorld with the free shuttle 17 or 19 in front of the hotel ( no way believe me, other places nearby aren't clean at all)

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Best sunset
reviews.text: We had a great stay at the hotel. Stuff is very helpful. Clean, comfortable room. We stayed on 4th floor with balcony. The view was wonderful. I’m looking to get back as soon as I can.

reviews.title: Nice balcony view
reviews.text: Relaxing stay here. Room clean and comfortable. Receptionist and cleaners very helpful and friendly.

reviews.title: Relaxing stay
reviews.text: Nice relaxing stay. Clean comfortable room, friendly reception and cleaning staff. Would stay here again.

reviews.title: Very Good!
reviews.text: The location is very good near the night market. Walkable to the beach and close by to the bus station to the airport or GrandWorld. The room is big and comfortable with a beautiful view of the sea. The staff is very nice and friendly. Free water is provided. Overall is perfect and highly recommended!

reviews.title: Amazing hotel
reviews.text: First class staff, ideally located and breathtaking sunset views from your private balcony.

reviews.title: The sunset over the Gulf of Thailand is the best.
reviews.text:
I stayed in a SEA view room on the 4th floor, and the sunset over the Gulf of Thailand and the continuous sound of the waves was just amazing.

The furnishings were stylish, resembling a place where a Parisian lady might stay. The price is reasonable, the front desk staff is friendly and pleasant, and it’s just a short walk to the night market, so there’s nothing more to ask for. By the way, the beef restaurant across the street is also excellent!

reviews.title: Located near the night market
reviews.text: Nice clean room but most importantly its walking distance to the night market.
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Very good

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Affordable and perfect location

reviews.title: Travel with Mom
reviews.text: The facility is neat and very convenient to use. Especially, the staff (Mcu, Phung, Linh, Duc, Tnui, Diem) were very friendly, which was great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The best view ever.... could decide to go and sleep and waited for the moon to set until 04.30 drinking wine on the balcony.
reviews.response: It is an honor to serve you. Thank you very much

reviews.title: Very good.
reviews.text: 1 bedroom can accommodate 6 people with 3 king-size beds, and a hairdryer is provided. Just bring a three-prong plug. Highly recommended for Thai people who want to stay here. The location is convenient, close to the airport and near a night market that has plenty of delicious food that Thai people will surely enjoy. If you stay here, there are many advantages, such as being close to the bus stop to travel to VinWonder and to Sunworld. Highly recommend this place, although the staff cannot speak English, the service is excellent. I fully support it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I like the sea view here, the amenities are not too many but at this price, it's very reasonable for a trip.

reviews.title: It's a good accommodation.
reviews.text: It is a budget-friendly accommodation next to the beach. It was convenient for dining as restaurants and markets were nearby. The ocean view was fantastic, and I would be willing to visit again in the future.

reviews.title: Good accommodation for travelers
reviews.text: It is close to Phu Quoc Market and cheap, but clean with friendly staff service. The ocean view room was neat and nice. It was a great accommodation for backpackers.

reviews.title: Second time staying here
reviews.text: Great hotel! I recommend it. This is my second time staying here.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is in a very good location. Walking distance to the nightmarket and the beach. Nearby restaurants and shops. Staff is friendly and price is cheap for such a big room!

reviews.title: Location
reviews.text: It takes only 5 minutes to get there at night and about 13 minutes to the market in the morning. The sunset from the room and the fishing lights at midnight are also amazing.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Les chambres " vue sur la ville" sont extrêmement bruyantes . À éviter.
Les chambred

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: L'hôtel est bien situé.  Agoda doit rajouter qu'il est près du marché de Dûong Dong. Le gérant est sympa

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Chambre coté rue. Beaucoup de bruit de la route..sinon tres bien

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Благодарю удачного отдыха расположение удачное все рядышком

reviews.title: Convenient location
reviews.text:
The location is the plus of this hotel. It is walking distance to everywhere:
Night market: 10mins
Harbour: 5mins
Beach: 10 mins
The balcony in the rooms with the sea view is also a plus.

reviews.title: Visiter PQ
reviews.text: L'accueil est adorable

reviews.title: Schlechte Erfahrung bei Hotel erleben
reviews.text:
Teuer als Preis bei Website angezeigt. Extra Zuzahlung obwohl wir genauer Personen eingegeben. Mit dem Preis kann ich besseres Hotel buchen können.
Giá phụ thuê không báo trước. Trong khi trên mạng thông báo giá phòng cho 3 người là 350k, nhưng tổng thanh toán cho 2 đêm lại phụ trội thành 1tr3. Hãy cẩn thận khi thuê
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower

reviews.title: Gute Lage, harte Matratze und lahmes Internet
reviews.text: über das Hotel kann ich recht wenig sagen denn ich hatte mir ein Roller gemietet und die Insel erkundet. Die Lage ist super, man ist innerhalb 3 Minuten am Nachtmarkt, mehere Restaurants in unmittelbarer Nähe. Vom Balkon aus (Zimmer mit Meerblick) hat man einen Super Bilck um den Sonnenuntergang zu sehen. Negativ war das extrem lahme Internet und die harte Matratze.
reviews.positives: Lage, Sauberkeit, tolle Aussicht (hatte Zimmer mit Meerblick)

reviews.title: Sehr saubere Zimmer mit viel Platz
reviews.text: Wir waren hier nur 2 Nächte um uns erstmal auf der Insel zu orientieren! Die Zimmer sind extrem sauber und groß! Die Betten leider sehr hart! Die Lage ist super um nachtmahlt und Strand in der Nähe zu haben! Leider kein frühstück, aber vll wird es ja bald angeboten (alles noch recht neu)!!

reviews.title: Benötigt eine Renovierung
reviews.text:
Bett sehr bequem und Bettzeug mit ganz leichten Spuren. Es kam jeden Tag Personal zur Reinigung vorbei und brachte auch jeden Tag frische Bettwäsche. Balkon mit tollem Meerblick.

Es bedarf aber einer Renovierung, hat mich persönlich aber nicht gestört.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Haben das Zimmer ohne Probleme tauschen können, da wir keinen Balkon hatten und es Schimmel an der Wand gab. Sehr zuvorkommendes Personal, gute zentrale Lage!
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower

reviews.title: Top Lage für kleinen preis
reviews.text: Leider hatte die S-Bahn geschlossen,  sonst alles gut

reviews.title: Schöne zentrale lage
reviews.text: Das Personal war sehr freundlich, könnten ohne Probleme das Zimmer tauschen, da uns ein Balkon gefehlt hat. Wurden sogar darauf hin gewiesen als wir verlängern wollten, wieder über Agoda zu buchen da es preislich einen Unterschied von über 50% machte. Ansonsten war das Personal auch sehr hilfsbereit, bei allen Fragen!

reviews.title: Best Deal
reviews.text: Alles super tolles Zimmer ,groß mit schönen Blick aufs Meer, Umgebung hat viele Geschäfte und nicht weit zu einer Strandbar.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Very good

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Very good stuff at the reception.

reviews.title: Gutes Hotel
reviews.text: Sehr freundliches Personal an der Rezepton.

reviews.title: Buono
reviews.text: Tariffe vantaggiose, posizione comoda e spa
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower

reviews.title: Prijstechnisch prima hotel
reviews.text: Skybar is gesloten en ook bij de massage ruimte werden we weg gestuurd. Interieur gedateerd maar functioneel. Bij aankomst bleek dat er werkzaamheden waren aan de brandbeveiliging wat voor behoorlijk geluidsoverlast zorgde. De straatzijde kamers zijn lawaaierig. Wellicht de kamers met zeezicht beter. Al met al niet slecht maar ook niet goed.

reviews.title: ダニに数十箇所噛まれました。
reviews.text:
私たちは滞在わずか1~2時間のうちにダニに数十箇所を刺され、夜を越すことなく1泊分を支払い別のホテルに移りました。
途上国ではよくあることですが、気分の悪い滞在でした。

reviews.title: 建物自体が老朽化
reviews.text:
建物はボロボロです。
シャワーは勿論弱いです。
ロケーションはナイトマーケット近くで良いです。
清潔では有りません。
虫が出ます。窓開けっぱなしだとヤモリも居ます。
ホテルの地下に変なマッサージ屋さんが併設しています。

reviews.title: 1/Fの部屋は騒音がひどい
reviews.text: 地下にマッサージがあり、深夜でも客の出入りが多く、話し声がうるさくて眠れない。車が走る音もよく響いて気になった。部屋のクオリティは値段相応。

reviews.title: スタッフが良くない。
reviews.text: バーで嘘をつかれた。

reviews.title: テレビ直して
reviews.text:
テレビ壊れてます。すきま風がビュービュー、海風の強い日は向かない。
ナイトマーケットも近く、何故か残念な宿。

reviews.title: ロケーション最高
reviews.text: ロケーション最高でしたが、設備が古く窓もあけずらい、クローゼットは古くて使いたくなかった。湯沸かしポットはいたるところにカルキが付着していた。ロケーションど選んだが、残念でした。

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: 中心地へアクセスが良さそうなので予約しました。屋上のバーは廃業していて廃墟のようになっていて、私たちの他にお客さんの姿も見えず、寂しい感じでした。部屋は海も見えず薄暗い感じで残念でした。良かったことは、子どもが怪我をしてしまった時にスタッフの方が親切に対応してくれました。
reviews.response: Thank you very much. We will resolve your issue immediately

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: ナイトマーケット等に近くて立地は最高だと思います。

reviews.title: コスパ良し
reviews.text:
フーコック島の街並み自体が若干不衛生なので仕方ないですが、細かい汚れや小虫、騒音は想定内です。
部屋にもヤモリが居て床には常時アリが這ってます。虫が苦手な方は避けて下さい。
ナイトマーケットやビーチにも徒歩圏内で周りに飲食店やマッサージもたくさんあり便利です。
すぐ隣にコンビニ風雑貨店あり。
部屋に金庫があれば星一つ増えたかもです。
reviews.room_type: Standard Double Room with Shared Shower
